## Environment

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| MATLAB version | e.g. R2025b |
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15 |
| AnyResearch version / commit | e.g. v0.2, abc1234 |
| Layer in use | e.g. Layer 0, Layer 1 Batch, Layer 3 PDF |

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

---

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open `main_run_pipeline.m` and set `query = "..."`, `fromDate = "..."`, ...
2. Run Section 0, then Section 1
3. See error / unexpected output

---

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

---

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Paste any error messages from the MATLAB Command Window:

```
% Paste error message here
```

---

## Relevant files / artifacts

If applicable, attach or describe:

- `run_meta.json` contents (search conditions and timestamps)
- Relevant lines from the MATLAB log output
- Screenshot of the Excel output (if the issue is display-related)

---

## Additional context

Any other context that helps reproduce or investigate the issue.
